name: fleet
description: Manage the persistent fleet registry; use maw ls for currently live sessions.
author: Soul-Brews-Studio

cli.help: maw fleet <init|ls|rename|renumber|validate|health|doctor|config-doctor|consolidate|sync|sync-windows|snapshots|restore|snapshot> [args] — manage registered fleet config; use maw fleet config-doctor for repo-local .claude/ drift; use maw fleet doctor --reboot for reboot auto-wake readiness; use maw ls for live sessions
